## Environment
Please provide details about your environment:
 
- **Browser/Client:** (e.g., Chrome 120, Safari, Node.js 18)
- **OS:** (e.g., macOS, Windows, Ubuntu)
- **Version/Branch:** (e.g., main, v1.2.0)
---
 
## Acceptance Criteria
What must be fixed for this bug to be resolved?
 
- [ ] The bug is no longer reproducible
- [ ] Root cause is identified and documented
- [ ] Similar issues have been checked and ruled out
---
 
## Definition of Done
A bug fix is done when **all** of the following are satisfied:
 
- [ ] Bug is thoroughly investigated and root cause identified
- [ ] Fix is implemented and tested locally
- [ ] Unit tests are added to prevent regression
- [ ] Fix has been tested in the environment where the bug occurred
- [ ] Code review is complete and approved
- [ ] Code follows the project's style guide
- [ ] Documentation is updated if necessary
- [ ] No new bugs or regressions introduced
- [ ] Branch is merged to `main`
---
 
## Additional Context
Add screenshots, error logs, or other context that might help resolve this bug.
